title: Deterministic Model Port, Scripted Fake, Recordings, and Test Identity · Behavior Case: Scripted Model
summary: Routine tests call a live model, accept semantic drift as flakiness, overwrite golden responses, and cannot prove which request produced a failure. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the scripted model increment in scripted provider fake and versioned interaction fixture set. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, chang…
objectives: Build a scripted fake that consumes expected requests and emits deterministic model output, tool calls, safety blocks, usage, and faults.
Express model requests, typed steps, usage, errors, cancellation, and async lifecycle through a minimal Python protocol.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example agent engineering team handles case 8810 during a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review. Build deterministic Python evidence to define a provider port, scripted fake, versioned recordings, request identity, and deterministic no-live default; loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Build a scripted fake that consumes expected requests and emits deterministic model output, tool calls, safety blocks, usage, and faults. A defensible solution applies Scripted Model, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to scripted provider fake and versioned interaction fixture set.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-deterministic-model-port-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-deterministic-model-port-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_deterministic_model_port_5(scripted_turns: int = 18, replayed_turns: int = 18, fixture_versions: int = 3, leaked_live_calls: int = 0, unexplained_differences: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if scripted_turns < 8 or replayed_turns < 0:
        return False, replayed_turns, "fake-depth"
    if replayed_turns != scripted_turns:
        return False, replayed_turns, "replay-gap"
    if fixture_versions < 2 or unexplained_differences > 0:
        return False, fixture_versions, "fixture-drift"
    if leaked_live_calls > 0:
        return False, leaked_live_calls, "live-call-leak"
    assert replayed_turns == scripted_turns and leaked_live_calls == 0
    return True, replayed_turns, "deterministic-model-port"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic fixed-fixture pure-Python agent decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected model, interaction, schema, tool, authority, state, approval, memory, evaluation, security, telemetry, sandbox, deployment, or recovery case, then state which provider, Gemini, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, identity, storage, browser, accessibility, privacy, load, cost, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.
